title: Automate received emails with a ticket number to attach to the same ticket number in monday.com
excerpt:
I’d really like to know if my received emails can be automatically stored against a project in monday.com. 
Any help would be appreciated. 
Philip

posts.author: philiprlittle (Philip Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d really like to know if my received emails can be automatically stored against a project in monday.com.

Any help would be appreciated.

Philip

posts.author: DanIngham-IOI (Dan Ingham IOI / BPX)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Philip
Hope all is well
Have you looked into the Email & Activities add on from Monday.com
It allows you to connect you email account to the items in Monday.com
You can send emails direct from Monday, and any replies automatically get tracks through Monday against the same item
There are also lots of Automations that can be accessed.

There might also be an integration that can be done if your ticket emails are arriving from a different piece of Software
If you need any help with integrations of tickets please don’t hesitate to let us know
Hope this is of help
Many thanks Dan
